description: Docker Compose deployment for the self-hosted WinGetty winget repository server.
notes: Edit $dir\docker-compose.yml before first start if you want to change the defaults.
Edit $dir\caddy-compose.yml and $dir\Caddyfile before first start to configure HTTPS.
Trust the Caddy-issued certificate authority on winget clients, or replace the default config with a publicly trusted certificate.
Start WinGetty with: docker compose -f "$dir\docker-compose.yml" up -d
Start the HTTPS proxy with: docker compose -f "$dir\caddy-compose.yml" up -d
Stop WinGetty with: docker compose -f "$dir\docker-compose.yml" down
Stop the HTTPS proxy with: docker compose -f "$dir\caddy-compose.yml" down
